title: Low Cohesion
summary: A module or service handles too many unrelated responsibilities.
inspection_goal: Identify components whose internal responsibilities appear broad, inconsistent, or weakly related.
why_it_matters: Creates pressure for future coupling and boundary problems
primary_signals: One module connects to many unrelated clusters
A node has broad outward dependency diversity
Large components mix domain, utility, and infrastructure links
Internal structure appears wide but weakly centered
inspection_questions: Does this component have one clear purpose?
Do its dependencies point to multiple unrelated concerns?
Would a reader infer several responsibilities from its connections?
Is this component acting as a catch-all bucket?
recommendation_patterns: Extract unrelated responsibilities into separate modules
Move utility or infrastructure concerns out of domain-heavy modules

severity_guidance.high: A component mixes several unrelated concerns and sits on many unrelated paths.
severity_guidance.medium: The component has a dominant responsibility but still carries obvious extras.
severity_guidance.low: The component is mostly cohesive with minor spillover.
